message:
feat(replay): actionable remediation guidance engine (ft-og6q6.5.7)

RemediationEngine generates fix suggestions from divergences. Maps root causes
to actions: RuleDefinitionChange→AddAnnotation+UpdateRule, InputDivergence→
InvestigateUpstream, cascading root cause detection via suggest_all().
25 unit tests + 16 property tests verify suggestion invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
